vanguard-warlock-mentor.headline: Ikora Rey
vanguard-warlock-mentor.subtitle: Vanguard Warlock Mentor
vanguard-warlock-mentor.flavorText: Respected among all Orders, Ikora Rey tutors new Warlocks with a lifetime of hard-earned knowledge.

repFactions.repDescription:
Gain Vanguard Reputation to level up your rank with this faction by completing Vanguard Bounties, Patrol missions, Playlist Strikes and Nightfall Strikes.

Increasing your rank unlocks Legendary armor for purchase, with stat rolls and perks randomly generated at each weekly reset.

Achieving higher rank levels will reward you a Reputation Package.

sales.saleFootnote: *Towerwatch Shell* is offered with 3 possible rolls per week.

sections.textBlock:
*"Your Light shines brightly against the Darkness. Burn brightly, Warlock. And be careful out there."* —Ikora Rey

Gaining new ranks above will present you a choice from 3 reward packages. Potential contents can be previewed in-game. The package is immediately opened when acquired, and contains 1 Guaranteed Item, 4 Motes of Light, 4 Strange Coins, and may contain up to 2 Possible Items. Reputation Pacakages do not stack, so claim your rewards before continuing to increase your rank.

vanguard-titan-mentor.headline: Commander Zavala
vanguard-titan-mentor.subtitle: Vanguard Titan Mentor
vanguard-titan-mentor.flavorText: A veteran Titan who coordinates the defense of the City, Zavala helps to outfit and mentor other Titans.

repFactions.repDescription:
Gain Vanguard Reputation to level up your rank with this faction by completing Vanguard Bounties, Patrol missions, Playlist Strikes and Nightfall Strikes.

Increasing your rank unlocks Legendary armor for purchase, with stat rolls and perks randomly generated at each weekly reset.

Achieving higher rank levels will reward you a Reputation Package.

sales.saleFootnote: *Towerwatch Shell* is offered with 3 possible rolls per week.

sections.textBlock:
*"Titan, your efforts strengthen our position. Every blow you deal to the enemy makes the city safer. Keep up the good work."* —Commander Zavala

Gaining new ranks above will present you a choice from 3 reward packages. Potential contents can be previewed in-game. The package is immediately opened when acquired, and contains 1 Guaranteed Item, 4 Motes of Light, 4 Strange Coins, and may contain up to 2 Possible Items. Reputation Pacakages do not stack, so claim your rewards before continuing to increase your rank.

vanguard-hunter-mentor.headline: Cayde-6
vanguard-hunter-mentor.subtitle: Vanguard Hunter Mentor
vanguard-hunter-mentor.flavorText: Saddled with Tower duty, Cayde-6 dutifully advises and arms Hunters who seek him out.

repFactions.repDescription:
Gain Vanguard Reputation to level up your rank with this faction by completing Vanguard Bounties, Patrol missions, Playlist Strikes and Nightfall Strikes.

Increasing your rank unlocks Legendary armor for purchase, with stat rolls and perks randomly generated at each weekly reset.

Achieving higher rank levels will reward you a Reputation Package.

sales.saleFootnote: *Towerwatch Shell* is offered with 3 possible rolls per week.

sections.textBlock:
*"You've been doing good work out there, Hunter. Word spreads. But hey, I'm not jealous or anything. Here, take this. Might come in handy."* —Cayde-6

Gaining new ranks above will present you a choice from 3 reward packages. Potential contents can be previewed in-game. The package is immediately opened when acquired, and contains 1 Guaranteed Item, 4 Motes of Light, 4 Strange Coins, and may contain up to 2 Possible Items. Reputation Pacakages do not stack, so claim your rewards before continuing to increase your rank.

vanguard-quartermaster.headline: Roni 55-30
vanguard-quartermaster.subtitle: Vanguard Quartermaster
vanguard-quartermaster.flavorText: Roni 55-30 maintains a stock of select weapons for those proven among the Vanguard.

repFactions.repDescription:
Gain Vanguard Reputation to level up your rank with this faction by completing Vanguard Bounties, Patrol missions, Playlist Strikes and Nightfall Strikes.

Increasing your rank unlocks Legendary armor for purchase, with stat rolls and perks randomly generated at each weekly reset.

Achieving higher rank levels will reward you a Reputation Package.

sales.saleFootnote: Purchase any Destination material in bundles of 20.

crucible-handler.headline: Lord Shaxx
crucible-handler.subtitle: Crucible Handler
crucible-handler.flavorText: A veteran of the Crucible, Lord Shaxx both arms and oversees those who seek to forge themselves within it.

repFactions.repDescription:
Gain Crucible Reputation to level up your rank with this faction by completing Crucible Bounties and Crucible Matches.

Increasing your rank unlocks Legendary armor for purchase, with stat rolls and perks randomly generated at each weekly reset.

Achieving higher rank levels will reward you a Reputation Package.

sections.textBlock:
*"Keep up the good work, Guardian. Show your fellow Guardians they can depend on you in a fight." —Lord Shaxx*

Gaining new ranks above Rank 3 will present you a choice from 3 reward packages. Potential contents can be previewed in-game. The package is immediately opened when acquired, and contains 1 Guaranteed Item, 4 Motes of Light, 4 Strange Coins, and may contain up to 2 Possible Items. Reputation Pacakages do not stack, so claim your rewards before continuing to increase your rank.

crucible-quartermaster.headline: Arcite 99-40
crucible-quartermaster.subtitle: Crucible Quartermaster
crucible-quartermaster.flavorText: The Crucible is a demanding place, and Arcite 99-40 assists Shaxx in arming Guardians to withstand it.

repFactions.repDescription:
Gain Crucible Reputation to level up your rank with this faction by completing Crucible Bounties and Crucible Matches.

Increasing your rank unlocks Legendary armor for purchase, with stat rolls and perks randomly generated at each weekly reset.

Achieving higher rank levels will reward you a Reputation Package.

gunsmith.headline: Banshee-44
gunsmith.subtitle: Tower Gunsmith
gunsmith.flavorText: There are few weapons that Banshee-44 has not seen, and fewer still that he cannot fix.

repFactions.repDescription:
Gain Gunsmith Reputation to improve your rank with this faction by completing objectives on Field Test foundry weapons.

Increase your rank to place additional Armsday orders, holding up to a maximum of 3 at once.

Achieving higher rank levels will reward you a Reputation Package.

sections.textBlock:
Each week 5 prototype weapons are provided by SUROS, Omolon, and Häkke foundries for Guardians to field-test for valuable weapon performance data. Complete the requested objective while wielding the weapon to be awarded Gunsmith Reputation.

All field-test weapons are common rarity with either sights or a barrel, and a single perk. Reputation is gained immediately upon objective completion, leaving behind the weapon with 100% progress which can be safely dismantled or kept. Duplicates have the same possible perks but different objectives. And yes, all of the Häkke weapons have the same name.

fieldTestSpecial.trailingTrim: to gather data for Häkke's armament scientists.
to gather data for Omolon's weapons developers.
to gather data for the Suros research department.

bannerSections.textBlock:
Armsday occurs in the Tower every Wednesday. Guardians with Gunsmith Reputation of at least Rank 1 can place orders for any of 5 foundry weapons until Friday. Armsday Orders occupy a weapon inventory slot, cannot be stored in the Vault, and can be discarded to abandon the order. A Guardian can hold a number of Armsday Orders equal to your Gunsmith Rank, up to the maximum of 3.

Held orders can be exchanged the following Armsday for a specific roll of the gun, with up to 3 different rolls offered equal to your Gunsmith Rank. Armsday Orders do not expire; you can choose to retain an order instead of exchanging it, and a different roll will be available each week. Held orders of any age still count against the 3 order limit, and an order must be exchanged or discarded to obtain more.

sections.textBlock: These foundry weapons can only be ordered as an Armsday order, or awarded from Gunsmith Reputation packages earned by increasing your rank.

*"Glad to see you take an interest. Helps advance the art. Yours and mine. Here, put ‘em to good use." —Banshee-44*

Gaining new ranks above Rank 3 will provide you a reward package to pick up from this vendor. The package is immediately opened when acquired, and contains 1 Legendary weapon from the Gunsmith Weapons, 4 Motes of Light, and 4 Strange Coins. Reputation Pacakages do not stack, so claim your rewards before continuing to increase your rank.

shipwright.headline: Amanda Holliday
shipwright.subtitle: Tower Shipwright
shipwright.flavorText: The shipwrights of the Tower repair and recommission the ships of the City's Guardians.

sales.saleFootnote: Two sparrow models from each line are available each week.
Six ships are available each week, ranging in rarity from Common to Rare.

sections.textBlock: Schematics for these ships can, on very rare occassion, be found in chests while on Patrol. Bring a schematic to the Shipwright to have the corresponding ship built. The drop rate is very low, and you can be given schematics you already have, but they do still drop.

dead-orbit.headline: Arach Jalaal
dead-orbit.subtitle: Dead Orbit Representative
dead-orbit.flavorText: Dead Orbit only grudgingly maintains a presence in the Tower to arm and outfit their champions in the Crucible.

repFactions.repDescription:
Pledge to Dead Orbit to gain reputation every time you gain Vanguard or Crucible Reputation from any source, equal to half that amount. You can hold a single Faction Badge to identify your allegiance, and can change allegiances to another city faction once per week.

Increasing your rank unlocks Legendary armor and weapons for purchase, with stat rolls and perks randomly generated at each weekly reset.

Achieving higher rank levels will reward you a Reputation Package.

sales.saleFootnote: Destination Material donation changes at weekly reset.
*Diaspora Shell* is offered with 3 possible rolls per week.

sections.textBlock:
*"Thank you, Guardian. Thanks to you, the way grows clearer." —Arach Jalaal*

Gaining new ranks above Rank 3 will present you a choice from 3 reward packages. Potential contents can be previewed in-game. The package is immediately opened when acquired, and contains 1 Guaranteed Item, 4 Motes of Light, 4 Strange Coins, and may contain up to 2 Possible Items. Reputation Pacakages do not stack, so claim your rewards before continuing to increase your rank.

future-war-cult.headline: Lakshmi-2
future-war-cult.subtitle: Future War Cult Representative
future-war-cult.flavorText: The War Cult has always been an open secret in the Tower, arming and advising those who represent them in the Crucible.

repFactions.repDescription:
Pledge to Future War Cult to gain reputation every time you gain Vanguard or Crucible Reputation from any source, equal to half that amount. You can hold a single Faction Badge to identify your allegiance, and can change allegiances to another city faction once per week.

Increasing your rank unlocks Legendary armor and weapons for purchase, with stat rolls and perks randomly generated at each weekly reset.

Achieving higher rank levels will reward you a Reputation Package.

sales.saleFootnote: Destination Material requested for donation changes each weekly reset.
*Bellicose Shell* is offered with 3 possible rolls per week.

sections.textBlock:
*"Your strength will secure a victorious future. We are grateful." —Lakshmi-2*

Gaining new ranks above Rank 3 will present you a choice from 3 reward packages. Potential contents can be previewed in-game. The package is immediately opened when acquired, and contains 1 Guaranteed Item, 4 Motes of Light, 4 Strange Coins, and may contain up to 2 Possible Items. Reputation Pacakages do not stack, so claim your rewards before continuing to increase your rank.

new-monarchy.headline: Executor Hideo
new-monarchy.subtitle: New Monarchy Representative
new-monarchy.flavorText: The New Monarchy gathers adherents in the Tower, and arms them well for the Crucible.

repFactions.repDescription:
Pledge to New Monarchy to gain reputation every time you gain Vanguard or Crucible Reputation from any source. You can hold a single Faction Badge to identify your allegiance, and can change allegiances to another city faction once per week.

Increasing your rank unlocks Legendary armor and weapons for purchase, with stat rolls and perks randomly generated at each weekly reset.

Achieving higher rank levels will reward you a Reputation Package.

sales.saleFootnote: Destination Material requested for donation changes each weekly reset.
*Senator Shell* is offered with 3 possible rolls per week.

sections.textBlock:
*"As you support the Last City, so shall the Last City support you. Thank you, Guardian." —Executor Hideo*

Gaining new ranks above Rank 3 will present you a choice from 3 reward packages. Potential contents can be previewed in-game. The package is immediately opened when acquired, and contains 1 Guaranteed Item, 4 Motes of Light, 4 Strange Coins, and may contain up to 2 Possible Items. Reputation Pacakages do not stack, so claim your rewards before continuing to increase your rank.

the-speaker.headline: The Speaker
the-speaker.subtitle: Speaker for the Traveler
the-speaker.flavorText: An ancient scholar of the Traveler, the Speaker keeps special items for Guardians who explore the Light's mysteries.

specialInfo.title: Raid Material Exchange
specialInfo.description: You will only have this exchange option when holding relevant materials. Energy can be converted to a Shard (or vice versa) for 50 Glimmer. 1 Shard can be exchanged for 250 Glimmer, or 2 Shards can be exchanged for 1 Mote of Light.

sales.saleFootnote: The Speaker offers Guardians a selection of class items with unique appearances; sigils, symbols, and shapes with some deeper history or meaning behind them.

You will only have this exchange option when holding relevant materials. Energy can be converted to a Shard (or vice versa) for 50 Glimmer. 1 Shard can be exchanged for 250 Glimmer, or 2 Shards can be exchanged for 1 Mote of Light.

While leveling, 6 Ghost Shells will be available for sale; a pair at every even numbered level, with available stock shifting as you gain levels. At maximum level 2 Ghost Shells will be available each week.

crotas-bane.headline: Eris Morn
crotas-bane.subtitle: Crota's Bane
crotas-bane.flavorText: Among the last of those Guardians who faced Crota, Eris works in the shadows to bring about his end.

repFactions.repDescription:
Face the Court of Oryx, the Taken Trials, and complete Quests for Eris to unlock special gear and upgrade materials.

Achieving higher rank levels will reward you a Reputation Package.

sections.textBlock:
*"A Light such as yours only glows brighter in the Darkness. But our battle is far from won. Please, take this. May it strengthen you for the fight to come." —Eris Morn*

Gaining new ranks will provide a reward package. Potential contents can be previewed in-game. The package is immediately opened when acquired, providing a Guaranteed Class item or Artifact, 4 Motes of Light, 4 Strange Coins, and Possible rewards of Dreadnaught materials and Summoning Runes. Reputation Pacakages do not stack, so claim your rewards before continuing to increase your rank.

The Artifacts are Class-specific and all feature elemental Catalyst perks, providing a chance for orb generation on precision kills with their element.

Originally Eris offered 3 different class items per Class across her reputation ranks. Like many other class items, these were all given updated item entries for Rise of Iron with new icons. However for some reason they were all left unfinished, without stats and with no source.

These gauntlets were a reward from Eris Morn upon completion of the Urn of Sacrifice questline, part of The Dark Below prior to the release of The Taken King. They are now unobtainable and cannot be recovered if dismantled. Visually they were variants of the Crota's End raid armor pieces.

guardian-outfitter.headline: Eva Levante
guardian-outfitter.subtitle: Guardian Outfitter
guardian-outfitter.flavorText: An artist with micromaterial programs, Eva provides Guardians ways to customize their appearance.

sales.saleFootnote: Legendary Emblems which were originally sold by The Speaker, explaining their shared “Blessing of…” naming convention. Now they're sold by Eva for 7 Motes of Light. She offers six of these emblems each day.
Twelve of these Emblems are available for purchase, refreshing at daily reset.
Six shaders are available for purchase, refreshing at daily reset.
Four random colors of Chroma are available each day to purchase for Silver Dust.

agent-of-the-nine.headline: Xûr
agent-of-the-nine.subtitle: Agent of the Nine
agent-of-the-nine.flavorText: Xûr comes and goes freely, his strange curios eagerly sought by adventurous Guardians.

repFactions.repDescription:
Xûr mysteriously arrives in one of several predetermined spots in either the Tower or Vestian Outpost each Friday reset, and vanishes each Sunday reset. His will is not his own.

He offers Exotics and other goods provided by The Nine in exchange for Strange Coins. Exotics offered are on a randomized rotation, always including a weapon and an armor piece for each Guardian class.

Xûr also offers Legacy Exotic Engrams for a steep fee, which decrypt into Year 1 Exotics. These operate on a knock-out system for duplicate protection.

sales.saleFootnote: Two ornament bundles are offered each weekend.

sections.textBlock: Each weekend Xûr will offer a single piece of Exotic armor for each Guardian class from these options.

Xûr offers a rotating selection of Exotic Weapons bundled with an Ornament. This covers most Ornaments for the weapons he can also sell. The Silver Dust cost is equivalent to purchasing the Ornament through the Siver Dust Kiosk in the Tower.

These Sparrow drives can be used on an equipped Rare Sparrow to upgrade it into a Legendary variant of the same Sparrow with the corresponding color of contrail. Guardians tend to pass these over in favor of the more useful and reasonably priced wares Xûr offers.

cryptarch-tower.headline: Master Rahool
cryptarch-tower.subtitle: Tower Cryptarch
cryptarch-tower.flavorText: Crypto-archeologists decode the past and our enemies, seeking new discoveries in matter engrams and artifacts returned by Guardians.

repFactions.repDescription:
Decode Engrams to gain Reputation with this faction and earn Reputation Packages. Cryptarch Reputation packages can only be picked up from Master Rahool in the tower, but decoding Engrams at any Cryptarch contributes ro reputation equally.

Legendary Engrams for sale do not require ranks to purchase.

sales.saleFootnote: Four slots of Engrams are offered, refreshing at weekly reset.
Any Cryptarch will accept these materials for 200 Glimmer each.

sections.textBlock:
*"Guardian, I appreciate the chance to study your findings. I hope you are not too disappointed with some of the results." —Cryptarch Master Rahool*

Gaining new ranks will provide a reward package. Potential contents can be previewed in-game. The package is immediately opened when acquired, providing 1 Guaranteed Rare or Legendary Engram (excluding Class Items), 4 Motes of Light, 4 Strange Coins, and up to 2 Possible rewards added. Reputation Pacakages do not stack, so claim your rewards before continuing to increase your rank.

Cryptarch Reputation packages award Engrams from the Year 3 decryption pool.

cryptarch-reef.headline: Master Ives
cryptarch-reef.subtitle: Vestian Outpost Cryptarch
cryptarch-reef.flavorText: Wherever Guardians go, Cryptarchs often find their services needed. Albeit at a safe distance.

repFactions.repDescription:
Decode Engrams to gain Reputation with this faction and earn Reputation Packages. Cryptarch Reputation packages can only be picked up from Master Rahool in the tower, but decoding Engrams at any Cryptarch contributes ro reputation equally.

Legendary Engrams for sale do not require ranks to purchase.

sales.saleFootnote: Four slots of Engrams are offered, refreshing at weekly reset.
Any Cryptarch will accept these materials for 200 Glimmer each.

Master Ives will exchange these 2 sizes of Amethyst for 2,500 and 5,000 Glimmer respectively. Only 1 of each can be held in your inventory at a time; if one is already present in your inventory, any new drop will be discarded entirely.

cryptarch-iron-temple.headline: Tyra Karn
cryptarch-iron-temple.subtitle: Iron Archivist
cryptarch-iron-temple.flavorText: Cryptarch, Warlock, and immortal observer of history, Tyra has returned to the Iron Temple to be the keeper of its artifacts.

repFactions.repDescription:
Decode Engrams to gain Reputation with this faction and earn Reputation Packages. Cryptarch Reputation packages can only be picked up from Master Rahool in the tower, but decoding Engrams at any Cryptarch contributes ro reputation equally.

Legendary Engrams for sale do not require ranks to purchase.

sales.saleFootnote: Four slots of Engrams are offered, refreshing at weekly reset.
Any Cryptarch will accept these materials for 200 Glimmer each.
Requires campaign completion. Memorial artifacts offered refresh at weekly reset.

sections.textBlock: After completing the Rise of Iron campaign, Tyra will offer Guardians the Champion of the Light quest. This quest can be completed once per character per week, and awards an Iron Lord's Legacy which can be exchanged for one of these unique artifacts. Each artifact memorializes an Iron Lord, and grants a unique ability often comparable to an Exotic armor perk.

disciple-of-osiris.headline: Brother Vance
disciple-of-osiris.subtitle: Disciple of Osiris
disciple-of-osiris.flavorText: Osiris seeks the strongest Guardians to stem the tide of the Darkness.

repFactions.repDescription:
From it's inception in House of Wolves until it's final occurence on August 14, 2017, Brother Vance oversaw the Trials of Osiris each weekend.

With the end of scheduled events, Vance can only exchange any Passage Coins you find for Motes of Light.

sales.saleFootnote: Motes of Light can be purchased for 3 Passage Coins. Passage Coins can be purchased for 1 Mote of Light, however doing so is not recommended as they have no other use.

queens-wrath.headline: Petra Venj
queens-wrath.subtitle: Queen's Wrath
queens-wrath.flavorText: Petra serves the Queen of the Awoken, directing the allies of the Reef in the Queen's service.

repFactions.repDescription:
Annihilate the enemies of the Reef. Gain Queen's Wrath Reputation to level up your rank with this faction by completing Queen's Wrath bounties, quests, and exchanging materials.

Increasing your rank unlocks cosmetic emblems, shaders, and a ship for purchase.

Achieving higher rank levels will reward you a Reputation Package.

sales.saleFootnote: Bounties all refresh daily, and always include 1 WANTED target, 1 bounty to kill Taken Lieutenants, and *Take Them All*.

sections.textBlock:
*"The Queen thanks you for your efforts against the House of Wolves." —Petra Venj*

Gaining new ranks above Rank 3 will provide you a reward package to pick up from this vendor. The package is immediately opened when acquired, and contains 1 Guaranteed Legendary piece of Queen's Wrath armor, 1 Possible ship, 4 Motes of Light, and 4 Strange Coins. Reputation Pacakages do not stack, so claim your rewards before continuing to increase your rank.

bannerSections.textBlock: On precisely 2 occassions, both within Year 1 of Destiny, Petra visited the Tower as the Queen's Emissary. The first of these Queen's Wrath events began September 23, 2014, and saw Guardians completing bounties and slaying Fallen story mission bosses to earn Rare and Legendary faction gear and cosmetics. The second event was the Wolf Hunt which took place for 4 days (intended as a full week, but reduced due to patch issues) immediately prior to the House of Wolves expansion, and saw Guardians eliminating Fallen traitors to the Queen as a preamble to the expansion's storyline.

house-of-judgment.headline: Variks, the Loyal
house-of-judgment.subtitle: Prison of Elders Warden
house-of-judgment.flavorText: Variks is loyal to the Queen, and has no love for the Kells who have taken command of the Fallen Houses.

repFactions.repDescription:
Defeat enemies in the Prison of Elders, complete weekly bounties, and use deprecated Tokens of Judgment or Treasure Keys to gain notoriety with the House of Judgment.

Raise your standing to unlock better rewards, including a weekly Judgment's Grant materials package at Rank 2 that improves to Judgment's Honor at Rank 3.

Achieving higher rank levels will reward you a Reputation Package.

sales.saleFootnote: Scorecard required for participation in the Challenge of Elders. Each week this will feature a bonus score modifier for Grenade, Melee, Precision, or Super kills. Reward thresholds are set at 30,000 points in a single activity for a weapon, and 90,000 points cumulatively for armor.
These can be viewed as a predetermined decryption, as each costs a matching slot of Legendary Engram to purchase in addition to 5000 Glimmer.
Ammo Synths cost 1 Ether Seed, and 100 or 150 Glimmer. Heavy Synths require Rank 1.
Bounties refresh at weekly reset.

sections.textBlock:
*"The Reef honors you for your efforts…as do I." —Variks*

Gaining new ranks above Rank 3 will provide you a reward package to pick up from this vendor. The package can be previewed in-game, and is immediately opened when acquired containing 1 Guaranteed item, up to 2 Possible items, 4 Motes of Light, and 4 Strange Coins. Reputation Pacakages do not stack, so claim your rewards before continuing to increase your rank.

iron-lord.headline: Lord Saladin
iron-lord.subtitle: Iron Lord
iron-lord.flavorText: The last of the Iron Lords, Lord Saladin has kept an eternal watch for the return of SIVA.

repFactions.repDescription:
The Iron Banner summons Guardians to prove their worth in the Crucible.

Event Standing starts anew with every Iron Banner.

Beginning in Rise of Iron, Lady Efrideet returned from the outer system to host the Iron Banner while Lord Saladin was preoccupied with the SIVA Crisis. The final Iron Banner event was held the week of August 1st, 2017. As a result, this faction can no longer be interacted with and any rewards still available are distributed via other means.

sales.saleFootnote: Originally PlayStation exclusives, these sets do not include pieces for the chest or legs. Aesthetically, they are variations of the Iron Companion set.

vanguard-scout.headline: Shiro-4
vanguard-scout.subtitle: Vanguard Scout
vanguard-scout.flavorText: Vanguard scout and wanderer, Shiro-4 is an expert assassin who values intel as much as artillery.

repFactions.repDescription:
Gain Vanguard Reputation to level up your rank with this faction by completing Vanguard Bounties, Patrol missions, Playlist Strikes and Nightfall Strikes.

Increasing your rank unlocks Legendary armor for purchase, with stat rolls and perks randomly generated at each weekly reset.

Achieving higher rank levels will reward you a Reputation Package.

sales.saleFootnote: Four available bounties refresh at weekly reset.
Sells 1 option for each class, refreshing at weekly reset. Cost includes a Legendary Class Item engram.
SIVA Key Fragments can be created from a SIVA Cache Key. Age of Triumph Ornaments can be purchased for 2 Perfect Ornaments and 25 Legendary Marks.

eververse.headline: Tess Everis
eververse.subtitle: Eververse
eververse.flavorText: Tess is the proprietor of Eververse, where Guardians can purchase unique curiosities and stylish wares.

repFactions.repDescription:
Eververse is the microtransaction shop of Destiny, selling wares for Silver which is exclusively acquired by purchase through console platform storefronts.

At times loot boxes or holiday items were sold through the store, but now Tess only carries the Treasure of Ages as a final consolidated item. These are identical to Treasure of Ages which can be earned in limited quantity per account per week via Featured Activities.

sales.saleFootnote: This shader can only be claimed by first obtaining a complete set of Age of Triumph armor for your Class. The Age of Triumph armor set is acquired through opening Treasures of Ages.

silver-dust-kiosk.headline: Silver Dust Eververse Vendor
silver-dust-kiosk.subtitle: Silver Dust Kiosk
silver-dust-kiosk.flavorText: Purchase items from Eververse with Silver Dust.
